name: aiskillgrid-hub-tools
description: Hub Node toolchain pinned for install.sh hub_ensure_npm_install (npm ci in repo root): OpenSpec CLI (@fission-ai/openspec), dmux, gitnexus@1.3.11 (matches optional_tool_clis + .configs/mcp/node/gitnexus.json), and MCP server packages under .configs/mcp/node/. Brave Search CLI (bx) and cocoindex-code (ccc) are installed by install.sh via curl/uv, not this file. See docs/01-installation.md.
